nasb.text: Once the trees went forth to anoint a king over them, and they said to the olive tree, ‘Reign over us!’

esv.text: The trees once went out to anoint a king over them, and they said to the olive tree, ‘Reign over us.’

cnv.text: 有一次，眾樹要去膏立一個王統治它們，就對橄欖樹說：‘請你作王統治我們吧。’

ccb.text: 从前，树木要选一个王，它们对橄榄树说，‘你来做我们的王。’
